text:
Created attachment 200193
patch to update the port

- Update 1.10 --> 2.001
Changes: https://github.com/openxpki/Crypt-PKCS10/commits/master
- "portlint -AC" just gives non-relevant warnings.
- testport of poudriere 3.2.99.20180601 runs ok:
	at 11.2-release-amd64, pkg 1.10.5, perl 5.26.2,
	with DEFAULT_VERSIONS+= ssl=openssl111
- Buil-in perl tests in a clean jail of poudriere say: "PASS".
